settings.text: Boost your energy and performance with Nitric Oxide—improving blood flow, oxygen delivery, and recovery so you can perform at your best, every day.

IMPROVES BLOOD FLOW
Ensures effective nutrient delivery.

BOOSTS STAMINA
Regenerated mitochondria provide efficient energy. 

LONG-LASTING ENERGY
More than 24-hour duration of effect.

SPEEDS RECOVERY
Helps your body recover faster after exercise.

As we AGE, Nitric Oxide (N.O.) levels naturally DECLINE, which impacts our body’s ability to DELIVER oxygen and nutrients efficiently to muscles and tissues, contributing to fatigue, slower recovery, and decreased stamina.

 __

But the good news is, boosting N.O. levels can turn things around— improving circulation, boosting energy, and supporting better physical performance and recovery. Maintaining healthy N.O. levels is key to sustaining vitality and endurance as we age.

settings.heading: Increases circulation **28%** in 90 days
settings.content: Clinically-proven enhanced circulation efficiently delivers oxygen and nutrients to support new blood vessel creation.

settings.heading: Increases **muscle stamina** and endurance in physical performance
settings.content: Supplementing to support N.O. increases anaerobic threshold in the body and delays the onset of muscle fatigue.

settings.heading: Sustainable energy for a **vibrant life**
settings.content: Clinical assay shows a single nitrate dose has a duration of effect of >24 hours, and daily use ensures N.O. levels remain in target range for optimal health despite age-related decline in endothelial function.

settings.heading: Speeds physical **recovery**
settings.content: The supplement's ability to reduce diastolic blood pressure by 4.7 mmHg (compared to 1.98 mmHg in the placebo group) aids in faster muscle recovery by promoting efficient oxygen and nutrient delivery during post-exercise recovery.

settings.heading: The Proven Benefits on **Energy & Endurance**
settings.text: Unlike many supplements, our products are backed by clinical studies. These studies have shown the incredible benefits of our Nitric Oxide Foundation on energy and endurance.
Just two capsules of Nitric Oxide Support, once a day, provide an effective dose of NO support for energy and endurance throughout the day.

settings.heading: By The Age of 40, Your N.O. Levels **Decrease By 50%**
settings.text: And continue to decline as you age. This leads to decreased blood flow, impairing the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to cells, and contributing to common age-related issues, including poor heart health, hormone imbalance, weakened immune response, and increased inflammation.
